2 SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED. 1ST BY FIRESIDE THRIFT FOR PARESH MITAL. 2ND BY PARESH MITAL FOR MATTHEW W. QUALL.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. "A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION" ASSIGNED TO CREATIVE CREDIT SOLUTIONS, INC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $40.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT MONTIS, ANTHONY AKA MONTIS, TONY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. "A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION" RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTIS, ANTHONY AKA MONTIS, TONY $2,104.27 PRINCIPAL, $2,099.37 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,217.64, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT OF CASE NO. 714606. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 3/25/02. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DECLARATION OF NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS, FILED.
THE INTEREST IN THE MEMORANDUM OF COST SUBMITTED IS ALREADY REFLECTED IN THE RENEWED JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE ON RENEWAL OF JUDGEMENT SERVE ON ANTHONY MONTIS, FILED.
